title: Whole Milk Queso with Umami Flavors
description: This light Mexican dish features whole milk and umami flavors to create a creamy and flavorful queso that's perfect for breakfast or snacking.
instructions: Combine the whole milk and onion in a saucepan. Bring to a simmer.
Add garlic cloves, olive oil, powdered onion powder, and bay leaves to the milk mixture. Stir occasionally until the mixture thickens.
Simmer gently for about 10 minutes, keeping an eye on it not to overcook or curdle the milk.
Remove from heat once desired thickness is achieved. Let cool slightly before serving.
Garnish with chopped chives if using.
